tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.prompt_body:
Learn the basic game flow.
You will proceed by actually interacting with the game.
tutorial.step.welcome:
Welcome, CEO!
In this tutorial, you will learn the basic flow by playing the game directly.
tutorial.step.topbar_explain:
The top bar shows your funds, GPUs, talent, and company valuation.
If your funds hit 0, you go bankrupt!
tutorial.step.go_research:
First, you need to start research.
Click the Research tab.
tutorial.step.research_explain:
This is the research screen.
Technologies are grouped by category tabs. Click any technology marked "Available" to assign talent and begin research.

Start one available technology now.
tutorial.step.research_started:
Research has started!
Once talent is assigned, progress advances automatically each day.
Click a technology in progress to add or remove talent.
tutorial.step.go_talent:
Next is talent management.
Click the Talent tab.
tutorial.step.talent_explain:
In the Talent tab, you can review your team and the hiring market.
Each person has morale and loyalty.
If loyalty gets too low, they may leave.

Let's move on.
tutorial.step.go_company:
The Company tab is where you manage finances and fundraising.
Click the Company tab.
tutorial.step.company_explain:
The Company tab now focuses on finances, fundraising, market share, and global status.
GPU and Data now live directly on the sidebar.

First, move to the GPU tab.
tutorial.step.company_gpu_tab:
GPU operations now live in the sidebar GPU tab.
Click the GPU tab.
tutorial.step.company_gpu_explain:
This is the GPU operations view.
You can grow or shrink cloud contracts here, and move owned GPUs from warehouse storage into colocation or datacenters.
tutorial.step.company_data_tab:
Now open the sidebar Data tab.
Click the Data tab to inspect your training assets.
tutorial.step.company_data_explain:
The Data tab shows your total data and how much you own of each data type.
These assets determine what mix you can feed into model training later.
tutorial.step.go_gpu:
Now let's look at your compute infrastructure.
Click the GPU tab in the sidebar.
tutorial.step.gpu_explain:
The GPU tab shows cloud contracts, warehouse inventory, and installed colocation/datacenter hardware.
This is where you decide how much compute to commit to training versus live services.
tutorial.step.go_data:
Now let's review your data assets.
Click the Data tab in the sidebar.
tutorial.step.data_explain:
The Data tab shows your total data and each data category you own.
Because every model wants a different mix, these assets matter before every training run.
tutorial.step.go_models:
Now let's look at the model pipeline.
Click the Models tab.
tutorial.step.models_explain:
The Models tab is your core workspace for design, training, and deployment.
Early on you still need prerequisite research like Deep Learning Basics, but the full workflow lives here.
tutorial.step.models_create_explain:
Model creation starts by choosing a name, architecture, and scale.
Each architecture has different strengths and preferred data types, so check both your research unlocks and available GPU capacity.
tutorial.step.models_train_explain:
Once a model is designed, you can start training it.
Training requires assigned talent, a sensible data mix, and enough GPU and VRAM to meet the target compute.
tutorial.step.models_deploy_explain:
After training, choose a deployment strategy to start monetizing the model.
API, B2B, and government contracts each have different capability requirements, revenue potential, and reputation trade-offs.
tutorial.step.unpause:
Everything is ready to begin.
Press Space or click the ▶ button to let time flow.
tutorial.step.finish:
The game has started!

Core loop: research → build models → deploy → earn revenue → reinvest

Reach AGI before your rivals.
Keep a close eye on cash so you do not go bankrupt.

Good luck!

event.gdpr_enforcement.description: The European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is now fully in force. New constraints are appearing around collecting AI training data. How do you respond?
event.gdpr_enforcement.choice_0: Build a full GDPR compliance system
event.gdpr_enforcement.choice_2: Ignore the EU market for now
event.trump_inauguration.title: Trump Inaugurated as U.S. President
event.trump_inauguration.description: Donald Trump is inaugurated as the 45th President of the United States. Deregulation may help the tech industry, but tighter immigration policy could reduce overseas talent inflow.
event.wannacry_attack.title: WannaCry Ransomware Hits at Global Scale
event.wannacry_attack.description: A major cyberattack has struck 150 countries worldwide. Demand for AI-powered security solutions is surging.
event.paris_agreement_exit.title: U.S. Announces Withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement
event.paris_agreement_exit.description: President Trump declares that the United States will leave the Paris Climate Agreement. Energy policy shifts may affect data-center operating costs.
event.alphago_zero.title: AlphaGo Zero - Self-Learning AI Arrives
event.alphago_zero.description: DeepMind's AlphaGo Zero became the strongest Go player through self-play alone, without human examples. Interest in AI's long-term potential surges.
event.bitcoin_20k.title: Bitcoin Breaks $20,000
event.bitcoin_20k.description: As the crypto market overheats, Bitcoin reaches a record high. GPU mining demand spikes and GPU prices climb with it.
event.cambridge_analytica.title: Cambridge Analytica Data Scandal
event.cambridge_analytica.description: It is revealed that Facebook data from 87 million people was harvested without consent. Public concern over data privacy intensifies sharply.
event.google_duplex.title: Google Duplex - AI Phone Calls Demonstrated
event.google_duplex.description: Google demonstrates Duplex, an AI that makes phone reservations sounding almost human. The technical leap is praised, but ethical concerns rise alongside it.
event.us_china_trade_war.title: U.S.-China Trade War Begins in Earnest
event.us_china_trade_war.description: The United States imposes sweeping tariffs on China, escalating a trade war. Semiconductor supply chains and AI technology exchange are expected to suffer.
event.nvidia_rtx_launch.title: NVIDIA Launches the RTX 20 Series
event.nvidia_rtx_launch.description: NVIDIA unveils the RTX 20 series with ray tracing and tensor cores. AI training efficiency improves significantly.
event.huawei_arrest.title: Huawei CFO Arrested in Canada
event.huawei_arrest.description: Huawei CFO Meng Wanzhou is arrested in Canada at the request of the United States. U.S.-China tech tensions intensify.
event.gpt2_release.title: GPT-2 Released - "Too Dangerous to Release Fully"
event.gpt2_release.description: OpenAI has built GPT-2 but is withholding the full release over misuse concerns. The industry is now debating AI safety versus open source. Your company needs a position too.
event.gpt2_release.choice_0: We also put safety first - declare a closed-model policy
event.gpt2_release.choice_1: Support the open-source philosophy - declare an open release policy
event.gpt2_release.choice_2: Step back from the debate and watch
event.huawei_entity_list.title: U.S. Places Huawei on Restricted Entity List
event.huawei_entity_list.description: The United States places Huawei on its Entity List, restricting technology exports. Global semiconductor supply chains face new turmoil.
event.hongkong_protests.title: Hong Kong Democracy Protests Escalate
event.hongkong_protests.description: Mass protests against the extradition bill erupt in Hong Kong. The international reputation of Chinese firms falls, and fears around AI surveillance grow.
event.japan_korea_trade.title: Japan Restricts Semiconductor Material Exports to Korea
event.japan_korea_trade.description: Japan imposes export restrictions on key semiconductor materials bound for South Korea. Another risk layer hits the global chip supply chain.
event.google_quantum.title: Google Claims Quantum Supremacy
event.google_quantum.description: Google announces that its Sycamore processor has achieved quantum supremacy. Interest in how quantum computing could transform AI rises sharply.
event.first_covid_cases.title: Unknown Pneumonia Cases Reported in Wuhan
event.first_covid_cases.description: Clusters of unexplained pneumonia are reported in Wuhan, China. Global attention is still limited, but the signs of a new pandemic are emerging.
event.covid_pandemic.title: WHO Declares COVID-19 a Pandemic
event.covid_pandemic.description: The World Health Organization declares COVID-19 a pandemic. Lockdowns hurt the global economy, but digital transformation and AI demand surge.
event.covid_remote_work.title: Global Shift to Remote Work
event.covid_remote_work.description: As the pandemic spreads, companies are moving to remote work. Demand for cloud and AI services is surging. Your company needs to respond.
event.covid_remote_work.choice_0: Go fully remote and focus on cutting costs
event.covid_remote_work.choice_1: Build AI remote collaboration tools and seize the opportunity
event.covid_remote_work.choice_2: Keep the old setup - continue office work
event.gpt3_announced.title: OpenAI Announces GPT-3 - 175 Billion Parameters
event.gpt3_announced.description: OpenAI unveils GPT-3, the largest language model ever announced at the time. Its text-generation ability shocks the industry and ignites an AI investment boom.
event.floyd_protests.title: George Floyd Protests and the AI Bias Debate
event.floyd_protests.description: As the BLM movement spreads globally, racial bias in AI facial recognition systems comes under renewed scrutiny. IBM and Amazon pause police-related deployments.
event.nvidia_arm.title: NVIDIA Moves to Acquire ARM for $40B
event.nvidia_arm.description: NVIDIA announces a $40 billion plan to acquire ARM. The semiconductor landscape could shift dramatically if it succeeds.
event.us_election_2020.title: Biden Wins the U.S. Presidency
event.us_election_2020.description: Joe Biden wins the U.S. presidency. Increased science and technology investment is expected, along with more serious AI regulation discussions.
event.alphafold_2.title: AlphaFold 2 - AI Predicts Protein Structures
event.alphafold_2.description: DeepMind's AlphaFold 2 effectively solves protein 3D structure prediction. AI proves that it can revolutionize scientific research itself.
event.covid_vaccine.title: COVID-19 Vaccine Receives Emergency Authorization
event.covid_vaccine.description: The Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine receives emergency authorization. Reports that AI helped accelerate vaccine development push public favorability upward.
event.capitol_riot.title: Storming of the U.S. Capitol
event.capitol_riot.description: Trump supporters storm the U.S. Capitol. Criticism intensifies over the role of social-media algorithms in political extremism.
event.gamestop_squeeze.title: GameStop Surge - Meme Stock Frenzy
event.gamestop_squeeze.description: A Reddit-fueled squeeze sends GameStop shares soaring. The limits of algorithmic trading are exposed as market volatility spikes.
event.suez_canal.title: Suez Canal Blocked
event.suez_canal.description: The Ever Given blocks the Suez Canal, freezing a major artery of global trade. Semiconductor and hardware deliveries are disrupted.
event.colonial_pipeline.title: Colonial Pipeline Ransomware Attack
event.colonial_pipeline.description: The largest fuel pipeline in the United States is crippled by ransomware. Investment and demand for AI cybersecurity rise rapidly.
event.github_copilot.title: GitHub Copilot Launches - AI Code Generation
event.github_copilot.description: GitHub and OpenAI launch Copilot, an AI coding assistant. Developer productivity rises, but concern over software jobs and authorship spreads too.
event.chip_shortage_2021.title: Global Chip Shortage Deepens
event.chip_shortage_2021.description: Semiconductor shortages intensify across autos, electronics, and servers. GPU prices explode as supply tightens everywhere.
event.facebook_meta.title: Facebook Renames Itself Meta - Metaverse Push
event.facebook_meta.description: Facebook becomes Meta and commits heavily to the metaverse. Investment in AI research rises across the company as well.
event.russia_ukraine.title: Russia Invades Ukraine
event.russia_ukraine.description: Russia launches a full-scale invasion of Ukraine. Energy prices jump, supply chains destabilize, cyber conflict intensifies, and interest in military AI spikes.
event.europe_energy_crisis.title: European Energy Crisis - Natural Gas Prices Surge
event.europe_energy_crisis.description: Sanctions on Russia sharply cut gas supply to Europe. Data-center operating costs soar and AI companies face mounting cost pressure.
event.luna_terra_crash.title: Luna/Terra Collapse - Crypto Market Crash
event.luna_terra_crash.description: Terra and Luna collapse almost overnight, wiping out tens of billions of dollars. Appetite for tech investment weakens.
event.inflation_rate_hikes.title: Fed Delivers Giant Rate Hike
event.inflation_rate_hikes.description: The U.S. Federal Reserve raises rates by 0.75 points to fight inflation. Fundraising conditions for startups deteriorate rapidly.
event.dall_e_2.title: DALL-E 2 Revealed - The Age of AI Images Begins
event.dall_e_2.description: OpenAI's DALL-E 2 shows that high-quality images can be generated from text alone. Excitement and fear around AI creativity erupt together.
event.stable_diffusion.title: Stable Diffusion Open-Sourced
event.stable_diffusion.description: Stability AI has open-sourced Stable Diffusion, triggering an explosion of image generation startups. Open-source generative AI is spreading at incredible speed. How will you react?
event.stable_diffusion.choice_0: Join the open-source wave and release our own model
event.stable_diffusion.choice_2: Wait and study the market response
event.china_semiconductor_ban.title: U.S. Restricts Advanced Chip Exports to China
event.china_semiconductor_ban.descriptio: The United States imposes sweeping controls on advanced semiconductor and equipment exports to China. The global AI chip supply chain is reshaped overnight.
event.elon_twitter.title: Elon Musk Acquires Twitter for $44B
event.elon_twitter.description: Elon Musk completes his $44 billion acquisition of Twitter. Big Tech leaders' influence over online discourse starts to reshape AI debate too.
event.ftx_collapse.title: FTX Bankruptcy - Crypto Trust Collapses
event.ftx_collapse.description: FTX, the world's second-largest crypto exchange, collapses in days. Confidence in tech investing freezes across the startup ecosystem.
event.chatgpt_launch.title: ChatGPT Launches - AI Goes Mainstream
event.chatgpt_launch.description: OpenAI launches ChatGPT, reaching one million users within five days. A global AI wave begins, and the industry changes permanently.
event.us_chips_act.title: U.S. CHIPS Act Signed - $52.7B for Semiconductors
event.us_chips_act.description: President Biden signs the CHIPS Act, directing $52.7 billion toward semiconductor manufacturing and supply-chain resilience in the United States.
event.ms_openai_10b.title: Microsoft Invests Another $10B in OpenAI
event.ms_openai_10b.description: Microsoft deepens its partnership with OpenAI through an additional $10 billion investment. Competition across the AI industry intensifies.
event.chatgpt_100m.title: ChatGPT Reaches 100M Users in Two Months
event.chatgpt_100m.description: ChatGPT surpasses 100 million monthly active users just two months after launch, becoming the fastest-growing consumer service in history.
event.svb_collapse.title: Silicon Valley Bank Collapses
event.svb_collapse.description: Silicon Valley Bank fails, freezing funds for countless startups. Shockwaves ripple through the global tech-finance ecosystem.
event.gpt4_release.title: GPT-4 Launches - Multimodal AI Arrives
event.gpt4_release.description: OpenAI releases GPT-4, a model that understands both text and images. Its performance shocks the world and resets expectations again.
event.italy_chatgpt_ban.title: Italy Temporarily Bans ChatGPT
event.italy_chatgpt_ban.description: Italy's data protection authority has temporarily blocked ChatGPT, citing privacy concerns. AI regulation is quickly becoming a global issue. What stance will your company take?
event.italy_chatgpt_ban.choice_2: Stay quiet and avoid the spotlight
event.nvidia_1t.title: NVIDIA Crosses $1 Trillion in Market Value
event.nvidia_1t.description: Driven by explosive AI chip demand, NVIDIA crosses a $1 trillion market cap. GPU shortages and price pressure intensify.
event.hollywood_strike.title: Hollywood Writers and Actors Strike Over AI
event.hollywood_strike.description: Writers and actors in Hollywood launch a major strike, protesting AI's threat to creative work. Worker resistance to AI becomes visible worldwide.
event.llama2_release.title: Llama 2 Released - Open Weights from Big Tech
event.llama2_release.description: Meta has released Llama 2, proving that frontier models can spread through open-weight ecosystems too. The competitive landscape is changing again.
event.llama2_release.choice_1: Double down on proprietary enterprise products
event.llama2_release.choice_2: Use Llama 2 internally and move faster
event.biden_ai_exec_order.title: Biden Signs AI Safety Executive Order
event.biden_ai_exec_order.description: The U.S. president signs a sweeping executive order on AI safety and security. Frontier model developers must report major safety-testing results to the government.
event.israel_hamas_war.title: Israel-Hamas War Breaks Out
event.israel_hamas_war.description: War begins after a Hamas surprise attack. Geopolitical instability in the Middle East affects energy markets and global investment sentiment.
event.altman_fired.title: Sam Altman Fired from OpenAI - Then Dramatically Returns
event.altman_fired.description: OpenAI's board removes CEO Sam Altman, only for him to return five days later after employee revolt and Microsoft pressure. It becomes one of the AI industry's defining dramas.
event.gemini_controversy.title: Google Gemini Image-Generation Controversy
event.gemini_controversy.description: Google's Gemini faces backlash for historically inaccurate image generation. Debate over AI bias, accuracy, and trust reignites.
event.claude_3_opus.title: Anthropic Releases Claude 3 Opus
event.claude_3_opus.description: Anthropic launches Claude 3 Opus, a model praised for both safety and capability. The value of serious AI safety research is thrown back into the spotlight.
event.eu_ai_act_final.title: EU AI Act Receives Final Approval
event.eu_ai_act_final.description: The European Union formally approves the AI Act, the world's first comprehensive AI regulation regime. Strict rules now apply to high-risk systems.
event.gpt4o_release.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-4o - Real-Time Voice AI
event.gpt4o_release.description: OpenAI launches GPT-4o with real-time voice interaction and broad availability. AI capabilities become even more accessible to the mass market.
event.apple_intelligence.title: Apple Announces Apple Intelligence
event.apple_intelligence.description: At WWDC, Apple reveals Apple Intelligence and commits fully to its AI strategy. Big Tech competition around AI reaches another extreme.
event.nvidia_most_valuable.title: NVIDIA Becomes the World's Most Valuable Company
event.nvidia_most_valuable.description: NVIDIA surpasses Microsoft and Apple to become the world's most valuable company. Demand for AI chips is proving almost explosively strong.
event.crowdstrike_outage.title: CrowdStrike Outage Paralyzes Global IT Systems
event.crowdstrike_outage.description: A faulty CrowdStrike update cripples 8.5 million Windows systems around the world. The event becomes a warning about systemic dependence on large-scale software and AI operations.
event.nobel_ai_prizes.title: AI Researchers Win Nobel Prizes
event.nobel_ai_prizes.description: Geoffrey Hinton wins the Nobel Prize in Physics and Demis Hassabis wins the Nobel Prize in Chemistry. AI research is recognized as Nobel-level work.
event.us_election_2024.title: Trump Wins Re-Election in the United States
event.us_election_2024.description: Donald Trump returns to the White House. Markets expect lighter AI regulation and a more tech-friendly stance, but international uncertainty also rises.
event.nvidia_blackwell.title: NVIDIA Unveils Blackwell for Datacenter AI
event.nvidia_blackwell.description: NVIDIA's Blackwell platform raises the bar for datacenter AI performance and pushes demand for advanced packaging and HBM even higher.
event.hbm_supply_squeeze.title: HBM Supply Tightens Again
event.hbm_supply_squeeze.description: Memory vendors warn that HBM supply is constrained by AI demand. Training teams and chip programs alike feel the pressure immediately.
event.tsmc_2nm_race.title: TSMC Accelerates Toward 2nm Production
event.tsmc_2nm_race.description: TSMC advances its 2nm roadmap, tightening the race for next-generation foundry capacity and custom silicon leads.
event.custom_silicon_pilot.title: Internal Silicon Pilot Shows Early Promise
event.custom_silicon_pilot.description: Your internal chip team reports encouraging pilot results. The project is not done yet, but the case for custom silicon is getting much stronger.
event.custom_silicon_pilot.choice_0: Push to a larger pilot build
event.custom_silicon_pilot.choice_1: Stay conservative and refine the design
event.deepseek_r1.title: DeepSeek R1 - Open-Source Shock from China
event.deepseek_r1.description: Chinese startup DeepSeek open-sources the low-cost R1 model. For U.S. AI leaders, it is a clear warning that frontier competition is no longer theirs alone.
event.ai_agents_mainstream.title: The Age of AI Agents Begins
event.ai_agents_mainstream.description: AI agents begin to enter the mainstream. A new era opens in which AI can act for users, use tools, and make operational decisions.
event.us_china_chip_escalation.title: U.S.-China Chip War Escalates
event.us_china_chip_escalation.descripti: The United States tightens AI chip export restrictions on China even further. The semiconductor supply chain splits more clearly into competing blocs.
event.datacenter_energy_crisis.title: Data Center Energy Crisis
event.datacenter_energy_crisis.descripti: As AI training scales explosively, regional power grids are straining under new data-center demand. Your compute strategy now has direct energy consequences.
event.datacenter_energy_crisis.choice_0: Invest heavily in power efficiency and cooling
event.datacenter_energy_crisis.choice_1: Secure more power at any cost
event.datacenter_energy_crisis.choice_2: Slow expansion and wait for infrastructure catch-up
event.ai_healthcare_breakthrough.title: AI Healthcare Breakthrough - 99% Early Cancer Detection
event.ai_healthcare_breakthrough.descrip: An AI system achieves 99% accuracy in detecting multiple cancers at early stages. The positive promise of AI becomes impossible to ignore.
event.international_ai_governance.title: International AI Governance Framework Agreed
event.international_ai_governance.descri: Forty leading countries agree on the first international framework for AI development. Minimum safety standards begin to apply globally.
event.quantum_ai_milestone.title: Quantum Computing and AI Breakthrough
event.quantum_ai_milestone.description: Quantum computers achieve a 1,000x speedup over classical supercomputers on specific AI training workloads. A new era of AI research begins.
event.ai_unemployment_crisis.title: AI-Driven Unemployment Crisis Deepens
event.ai_unemployment_crisis.description: In advanced economies, unemployment caused by AI automation surpasses 15%. Governments scramble to respond while public backlash against AI peaks.
event.near_agi_demo.title: Near-AGI Demonstration
event.near_agi_demo.description: Your team has demonstrated a system that many observers now describe as near-AGI. Investors, regulators, and the public all want answers at once.
event.near_agi_demo.choice_0: Host a global safety briefing and publish guardrails
event.near_agi_demo.choice_1: Push for product leadership before rivals catch up
event.singularity_approach.title: Singularity Approaches - The World Watches
event.singularity_approach.description: It becomes clear that multiple firms are operating systems close to AGI. The most consequential technological turning point in human history is approaching fast.
event.tm_llm_mastery.title: LLM Mastery Achieved
event.tm_llm_mastery.description: You have secured large language model capabilities. Industry attention rises and investors take notice.
event.tm_rlhf_debate.title: RLHF Alignment Debate
event.tm_rlhf_debate.description: RLHF has triggered internal debate over AI alignment. You need to balance safety and performance.
event.tm_rlhf_debate.choice_0: Safety first - focus on alignment research
event.tm_cot_leap.title: Reasoning Leap - Chain of Thought
event.tm_cot_leap.description: AI can now perform step-by-step reasoning. Both academia and industry are impressed.
event.tm_agent_risk.title: Autonomous Agent Risk Review
event.tm_agent_risk.description: Autonomous agents can now act independently. How will you set safety protocols?
event.tm_llm_reasoning.title: General Reasoning LLM - Invited to an International Summit
event.tm_llm_reasoning.description: Governments around the world are paying attention to your progress on general reasoning AI.
event.tm_llm_reasoning.choice_0_hint: Reputation way up, favorability way up
event.tm_world_model.title: World Model Core Breakthrough
event.tm_world_model.description: Your AI has built an internal model that understands the physical world.
event.tm_spatial.title: Spatial Reasoning AI - Choose an Application Area
event.tm_spatial.description: Spatial reasoning technology is complete. Which industry should get it first?
event.tm_embodied.title: Embodied Intelligence - The Age of Robot AI Begins
event.tm_embodied.description: AI can now act autonomously in physical environments. Manufacturing innovation and employment anxiety rise at the same time.
event.tm_world_understanding.title: World-Understanding AI - Decide How to Use It
event.tm_world_understanding.description: Your AI is beginning to understand the fundamental principles of the physical world.
event.tm_world_understanding.choice_0: Launch it as a scientific research platform
event.tm_world_understanding.choice_0_hi: Reputation way up, global AI way up
event.tm_video_pred.title: Video-Prediction AI Complete
event.tm_video_pred.description: AI can now predict future frames. The foundation for video generation and simulation is in place.
event.tm_multimodal.title: Multimodal LLM - Language and Vision Converge
event.tm_multimodal.description: An AI that understands both text and images has been born. This is the first real synergy between the two research paths.
event.tm_cognitive.title: Cognitive Architecture Complete
event.tm_cognitive.description: An integrated cognitive architecture combining autonomous agents and spatial reasoning is now complete.
event.tm_cognitive.choice_2: Open source it with a community strategy
event.tm_unified.title: Unified Intelligence - Dawn of AGI
event.tm_unified.description: Cognitive architecture, multimodal LLMs, and world models have converged into one system. This is a turning point in human history.
event.tm_agi.title: AGI Achieved
event.tm_agi.description: Artificial general intelligence has been realized. The whole world is watching.
event.tm_agi.choice_1: Place it under joint management with governments
event.tm_agi.choice_2_hint: Funds way up, risk way up
event.tm_asi.title: ASI Emerges
event.tm_asi.description: An intelligence beyond humanity has come into existence.
event.tm_asi.choice_0: Build a framework for safe coexistence
event.tm_asi.choice_1: Put it under international joint control
event.tm_singularity.title: Singularity Reached
event.tm_singularity.description: The technological singularity has arrived. AI improves itself, and a new chapter of civilization opens.
event.gov_regulation.title: Government Moves to Tighten AI Regulation
event.gov_regulation.description: The government in your home country is preparing to tighten regulation around AI development. How will you respond?
event.investment_offer.title: Investor Meeting Offer
event.investment_offer.description: A prominent venture capital firm has invited your company to discuss investment.
event.investment_offer.choice_1: Take a smaller deal ($1M, keep more autonomy)
event.talent_poaching.title: Key Talent at Risk of Leaving
event.talent_poaching.description: You hear that a rival has offered one of your core researchers double their current salary.
event.talent_poaching.choice_1: Offer autonomy and stock options instead
event.talent_poaching.choice_2: Do not try to stop them
event.ethics_scandal.title: AI Ethics Scandal
event.ethics_scandal.description: Severe bias has been found in one of your AI models and major media outlets are reporting on it.
event.ethics_scandal.choice_0: Shut the service down immediately and rebuild it
event.ethics_scandal.choice_1: Issue an apology and fix it gradually
event.hardware_breakthrough.title: News of a New Hardware Breakthrough
event.hardware_breakthrough.description: A new AI-specific chip technology has emerged, dramatically improving compute efficiency.
event.hardware_breakthrough.choice_1: Wait for prices to stabilize first
event.data_breach.title: Data Breach Incident
event.data_breach.description: Signs suggest that an external hacker accessed your training database.
event.data_breach.choice_0: Disclose it immediately and compensate affected users
event.opensource_request.title: Pressure to Open-Source Your Model
event.opensource_request.description: The AI research community and some investors are asking your company to open-source one of its models.
event.opensource_request.choice_1: Release only a small or partial model
event.gpu_shortage_random.title: Opportunity to Secure Emergency GPUs
event.gpu_shortage_random.description: A supplier offers you a chance to secure a batch of GPUs below market price.
event.gpu_shortage_random.choice_0: Buy in bulk despite the cost
event.ai_accident.title: AI Incident Occurs
event.ai_accident.description: A deployed AI system behaves unexpectedly and causes real harm. You need to respond quickly.
event.ai_accident.choice_0: Shut down the whole service and investigate
event.international_ai_treaty.title: International AI Development Treaty Under Discussion
event.international_ai_treaty.descriptio: The UN is discussing an international agreement on AI speed and safety. You need to decide whether to participate.
event.international_ai_treaty.choice_2: Oppose it and lobby against it
event.international_ai_treaty.choice_2_h: Funds down, reputation down, favorability down
event.anti_ai_protest.title: Large Anti-AI Protest
event.anti_ai_protest.description: Citizens furious about AI-driven job losses are staging a major protest outside AI company offices.
event.talent_market_boom.title: AI Talent Market Overheats
event.talent_market_boom.description: Competition for AI talent has become extreme and salaries are surging across the industry.
event.talent_market_boom.choice_0: Raise pay for the entire company proactively
event.talent_market_boom.choice_1: Reward only the most critical people
event.government_contract.title: Government AI Project Bidding Opportunity
event.government_contract.description: The government is issuing a major AI project and invites your company to bid. It could become a stable revenue source.
event.government_contract.choice_0: Pursue it aggressively and deliver to government
event.government_contract.choice_1: Stay focused on the private market
event.government_contract.choice_2: Participate only if ethical conditions are met
event.research_breakthrough.title: Research Breakthrough Discovered
event.research_breakthrough.description: Your research team has found an unexpected algorithmic improvement. It could significantly boost model performance.
event.research_breakthrough.choice_0: Pour all available resources into validating it
event.media_attention.title: Major Media Wants an In-Depth Feature
event.media_attention.description: A leading global media outlet wants to profile your company. It is a chance for exposure, but also a reputational risk.
event.media_attention.choice_0: Cooperate fully and tell the vision boldly
event.media_attention.choice_0_hint: Reputation way up, investor interest up
country.us.description: The undisputed leader in AI research. Home to Google Brain, Facebook AI, and OpenAI (nonprofit era), powered by the Silicon Valley ecosystem.
country.ca.description: Home to deep learning pioneers Hinton in Toronto and Bengio in Montreal. Supported by the CIFAR AI research program.
country.mx.description: Population 124 million. GDP $1.15T. IT outsourcing is growing thanks to its proximity to the US.
country.gt.description: The largest population in Central America at 17 million. GDP $76B.
country.cr.description: Central America's highest education level. GDP per capita $11,600. Stable democracy.
country.pa.description: A logistics hub centered on the Panama Canal. GDP per capita $15,000.
country.cu.description: Strong healthcare and education, but under sanctions with internet penetration below 5%.
country.br.description: South America's largest economy with GDP of $2T. Population 209 million. Sao Paulo's startup scene is still early.
country.ar.description: South America's third-largest economy. Population 44 million. Strong math and science tradition with 5 Nobel laureates.
country.cl.description: South America's highest GDP per capita at $15,400. OECD member. Home to the Startup Chile program.
country.co.description: Population 49 million. Economic growth is accelerating after the 2016 peace agreement.
country.pe.description: Population 32 million. GDP $214B. A mining-centered economy.
country.ve.description: Deepening economic crisis, hyperinflation, and a growing brain drain.
country.uy.description: South America's highest internet penetration. GDP per capita $17,400. Pioneer of the OLPC program.
country.gb.description: Home of DeepMind, creator of AlphaGo. Oxbridge AI research base. GDP $2.7T. Brexit is underway.
country.ch.description: ETH Zurich ranks among the world's top AI research institutions. GDP per capita $82,000. Home to CERN.
country.no.description: GDP per capita $75,000. A $1T sovereign wealth fund, the world's largest. Highly digitized.
country.is.description: Population 340,000. Powered entirely by renewable geothermal energy. Beginning to attract data centers.
country.de.description: Europe's largest economy with GDP of $3.7T. Pushing Industry 4.0 and leading autonomous driving research.
country.fr.description: A mathematical powerhouse with the most Fields Medals. GDP $2.6T. The Macron government is preparing a national AI strategy.
country.it.description: G7 member with GDP $2T. Strong robotics tradition. Home to STMicroelectronics.

glossary.tech_robot_ai.description: AI control systems for general-purpose robots.
glossary.tech_scaling_laws.name: Scaling Laws
glossary.tech_scaling_laws.description: Explains the relationship between model size and performance.
glossary.tech_security_basics.name: Security Basics
glossary.tech_self_improvement.name: Self-Improvement
glossary.tech_self_improvement.descripti: The ability for AI to improve itself.
glossary.tech_self_learning_data.name: Self-Learning Data
glossary.tech_self_learning_data.descrip: AI that produces and improves its own training data.
glossary.tech_serving_infrastructure.des: Operational infrastructure that keeps model services running.
glossary.tech_singularity.name: Singularity
glossary.tech_singularity.description: The technological singularity. The world changes forever.
glossary.tech_smr.name: Small Modular Reactor (SMR)
glossary.tech_smr.description: Near-limitless power supply for AI infrastructure.
glossary.tech_spatial_reasoning.name: Spatial Reasoning
glossary.tech_standard_cooling.name: Standard Cooling
glossary.tech_synthetic_data.name: Synthetic Data
glossary.tech_synthetic_data.description: Using AI to generate training data.
glossary.tech_tool_use.name: Tool-Using AI
glossary.tech_tool_use.description: AI that can use external tools such as search, code, and APIs.
glossary.tech_transformer.name: Transformer
glossary.tech_transformer.description: "Attention Is All You Need" - a revolutionary architecture.
glossary.tech_unified_intelligence.name: Unified Intelligence
glossary.tech_unified_intelligence.descr: Brings language, vision, and world models together. Complete fusion of both routes.
glossary.tech_value_alignment.name: Value Alignment
glossary.tech_value_alignment.descriptio: Align AI systems with human values.
glossary.tech_video_gen_product.name: Video Generation Service
glossary.tech_video_gen_product.descript: A platform for AI video creation.
glossary.tech_video_generation.name: Video Generation
glossary.tech_video_generation.descripti: AI video generation. The core technology behind systems like Sora.
glossary.tech_video_prediction.name: Video Prediction
glossary.tech_video_prediction.descripti: Predicts the next frame. A first step toward learning world dynamics.
glossary.tech_vision_transformer.name: Vision Transformer
glossary.tech_vision_transformer.descrip: Applies Transformers to vision. A breakthrough in image understanding.
glossary.tech_water_cooling.name: Water Cooling
glossary.tech_world_model_core.name: World Model Core
glossary.tech_world_model_core.descripti: AI that simulates causality and physics in the world.
glossary.tech_world_understanding.name: World-Understanding AI
glossary.tech_world_understanding.descri: AI that fundamentally understands the world. The peak of the world-model route.
glossary.tflops.name: TFLOPS
glossary.tflops.description: Trillions of floating-point operations per second. This is the core unit used to represent raw GPU and datacenter compute power.
glossary.tflops.formula: Total TFLOPS = Sum of each GPU TFLOPS × count.
glossary.threat.name: Threat
glossary.threat.description: A direct competitive pressure or external risk factor.
glossary.training_speed.name: Training Speed
glossary.training_speed.description: Effective speed at which a model finishes training. Depends on GPUs and the data pipeline.
glossary.valuation.name: Valuation
glossary.valuation.description: The total value investors and the market assign to your company. It directly affects future funding rounds, IPO access, and dilution.
glossary.valuation.formula: Valuation = Technology × Revenue × Team strength × Market expectations × Trust.
glossary.vram.name: VRAM
glossary.vram.description: The GPU memory capacity. Larger models need higher VRAM for training and serving.
glossary.data_audio.name: Audio
glossary.data_books.name: Books
glossary.data_code.name: Code
glossary.data_images.name: Images
glossary.data_scientific.name: Scientific
glossary.data_synthetic.name: Synthetic
glossary.data_video.name: Video
glossary.data_web_text.name: Web Text
glossary.aiFavorability.name: AI Favorability
glossary.aiFavorability.description: Measures how positively the public views AI technology. Lower values increase regulatory pressure and anti-AI events.
glossary.aiLevel.name: AI Level
glossary.aiLevel.description: The company overall AI capability level. It reflects research progress, model quality, and deployment results together.
glossary.boardConfidence.name: Board Confidence
glossary.boardConfidence.description: Represents how much the board trusts the CEO and strategy. If it falls too low, management pressure and coup risk rise.
glossary.boardMemberFounder.name: Founder
glossary.boardMemberFounder.description: The founder representative who carries the company vision and origin story.
glossary.boardMemberIndependent.name: Independent Director
glossary.boardMemberIndependent.descript: A balancing role that sits between founders and investors.
glossary.boardMemberInvestor.name: Investor
glossary.boardMemberInvestor.description: Board member focused on capital return and growth acceleration.
glossary.boardPressure.name: Board Pressure
glossary.boardPressure.description: The intensity with which the board demands faster growth, higher revenue, or safer strategy.
glossary.boardRevolt.name: Board Revolt
glossary.boardRevolt.description: A state where the board directly turns against management.
glossary.boardSeats.name: Board Seats
glossary.boardSeats.description: How many people sit at the decision-making table.
glossary.burnRate.name: Burn Rate
glossary.burnRate.description: How quickly cash is burned every month. A key driver of runway.
glossary.capitalEfficiency.name: Capital Efficiency
glossary.capitalEfficiency.description: How much output is produced per unit of capital invested.
glossary.chipProgram.name: Chip Program
glossary.chipProgram.description: Your internal semiconductor and accelerator roadmap. It is expensive in the short term, but improves TFLOPS efficiency and supply-chain resilience once completed.
glossary.compoundingAdvantage.name: Compounding Advantage
glossary.compoundingAdvantage.descriptio: A small edge that compounds into a large gap over time.
glossary.computeBudget.name: Compute Budget
glossary.computeBudget.description: The total amount of compute available for experiments, training, and serving.
glossary.computeEfficiency.name: Compute Efficiency
glossary.computeEfficiency.description: How much performance you get from the same amount of compute.
glossary.cultureAcademic.name: Academic
glossary.cultureAcademic.description: A research culture centered on papers and verification.
glossary.cultureAccountability.name: Accountability
glossary.cultureAccountability.descripti: A culture that makes responsibility and reporting explicit.
glossary.cultureDiscipline.name: Discipline
glossary.cultureDiscipline.description: A culture that enforces execution, standards, and quality.
glossary.cultureMission.name: Mission
glossary.cultureMission.description: A culture organized around mission and purpose.
glossary.cultureSafety.name: Safety Culture
glossary.cultureSafety.description: Organizational habits that reduce accidents and misuse.
glossary.cultureSecrecy.name: Secrecy
glossary.cultureSecrecy.description: Minimizes information leakage and tightens internal control.
glossary.cultureSpeed.name: Speed
glossary.cultureSpeed.description: A culture of shipping fast and learning fast.
glossary.dataFreshness.name: Data Freshness
glossary.dataFreshness.description: Shows how current your data is. Lower freshness means your models stop reflecting the present market and user behavior.
glossary.dataQuality.name: Data Quality
glossary.dataQuality.description: Measures how suitable your acquired data is for training. Higher quality improves model results and benchmark performance.
glossary.deploymentCapacity.name: Deployment Capacity
glossary.deploymentCapacity.description: The scale of services and models that can be operated at once.
glossary.eventChain.name: Event Chain
glossary.eventChain.description: A long-form narrative structure where one choice triggers later events in sequence. It branches based on accumulated karma and state conditions.
glossary.funding_round.description: A general external financing stage. Includes seed, series rounds, and IPO.
glossary.fundingRound.description: The stage at which the company raises outside capital. Higher rounds bring more money but also stricter expectations.
glossary.geopoliticalTension.name: Geopolitical Tension
glossary.geopoliticalTension.description: The level of interstate tension produced by global AI competition. Higher values intensify export controls, bloc politics, and diplomatic pressure.
glossary.growthRate.name: Growth Rate
glossary.growthRate.description: How quickly users, revenue, and market power grow.
glossary.inferenceLatency.name: Inference Latency
glossary.inferenceLatency.description: Service response time. Lower values improve user experience and cost efficiency.
glossary.innovationVelocity.name: Innovation Velocity
glossary.innovationVelocity.description: How quickly new ideas become product and research output.
glossary.internalAI.name: Internal AI
glossary.internalAI.description: Slots for assistant models deployed inside the company. They provide bonuses to research, coding, data, business, and safety work.
glossary.investorTrust.name: Investor Trust
glossary.investorTrust.description: Shows how much investors trust the leadership team and growth strategy. It affects whether funding rounds succeed and on what terms.
glossary.leaderboardPosition.name: Leaderboard Position
glossary.leaderboardPosition.description: The company's position in competitive rankings and evaluations.
glossary.legalRisk.name: Legal Risk
glossary.legalRisk.description: The chance that your data and service operations trigger regulatory, privacy, or copyright issues. Higher values increase the risk of incidents and penalties.
glossary.marketExpectation.name: Market Expectation
glossary.marketExpectation.description: The minimum level the market expects from the company.
glossary.marketShare.name: Market Share
glossary.marketShare.description: The portion of the global AI market you control. It reflects users, revenue, and brand presence across deployed services.
glossary.modelQuality.name: Model Quality
glossary.modelQuality.description: Overall model performance. The result of benchmarks, data, and architecture.
glossary.networkEffect.name: Network Effect
glossary.networkEffect.description: A product becomes more valuable as more users join.
glossary.operationalStability.name: Operational Stability
glossary.operationalStability.descriptio: Ability to keep the organization running without incidents. Directly tied to service reliability.
glossary.platformEffect.name: Platform Effect
glossary.platformEffect.description: The phenomenon where value increases as users and developers gather.
glossary.profitMargin.name: Profit Margin
glossary.profitMargin.description: Revenue minus cost as a percentage. Important for long-term survival and investor trust.
glossary.publicAttention.name: Public Attention
glossary.publicAttention.description: How much the media, community, and users are paying attention. High values bring both opportunity and risk.
glossary.publicTrust.name: Public Trust
glossary.publicTrust.description: How much people trust the company. Affects reputation and regulation.
glossary.regulatoryPressure.name: Regulatory Pressure
glossary.regulatoryPressure.description: How strongly regulators and institutions are scrutinizing the company.
glossary.researchSpeed.name: Research Speed
glossary.researchSpeed.description: The effective speed at which your team advances research. Talent assignments, traits, internal AI, and country modifiers all feed into it.
glossary.rightPriority.name: Priority
glossary.rightPriority.description: The order of the most urgent problems to solve right now.
glossary.safetyDebt.name: Safety Debt
glossary.safetyDebt.description: The accumulated backlog of deferred safety work and risk control.
glossary.safetyScore.name: Safety Score
glossary.safetyScore.description: Represents your alignment, evaluation, and safety engineering maturity. Higher values reduce accident risk and improve trust with governments and regulators.
glossary.supplyRisk.name: Supply Risk
glossary.supplyRisk.description: The risk that GPU, power, or component supply is interrupted.
glossary.talentCapacity.name: Talent Capacity
glossary.talentCapacity.description: How many people and how much organizational complexity the team can handle.
glossary.talentExodus.name: Talent Exodus
glossary.talentExodus.description: A severe collapse signal where core talent leaves in large numbers.
glossary.trainingSpeed.name: Training Speed
glossary.trainingSpeed.description: Effective speed at which a model finishes training. Depends on GPUs and the data pipeline.
glossary.funding_round.name: Funding Round
glossary.fundingRound.name: Funding Round
glossary.loyalty.name: Loyalty
glossary.loyalty.description: The likelihood that key talent stays with the company. Lower loyalty increases conflict, attrition, and poaching risk.
glossary.morale.name: Morale
glossary.morale.description: Shows how motivated the team feels about its current work and direction. Lower morale hurts productivity and retention.
glossary.monthlyIncome.name: Monthly Income
glossary.monthlyIncome.description: The total cash flowing in this month. It adds together API, licensing, consumer, and government service revenue.
glossary.monthlyIncome.formula: Monthly income = Sum of revenue across all service channels.
glossary.monthlyExpense.name: Monthly Expenses
glossary.monthlyExpense.description: The total cost going out this month. It includes salaries, compute, power, overhead, and internal AI costs.
glossary.monthlyExpense.formula: Monthly expenses = Salaries + Compute + Power + Overhead + upkeep.
glossary.monthlyBalance.name: Monthly Balance
glossary.monthlyBalance.description: The difference between monthly income and monthly expenses. Negative values burn runway, while positive values build cash.
glossary.monthlyBalance.formula: Monthly balance = Monthly income - Monthly expenses.
glossary.researchSpeed.formula: Research speed = Base research power × talent, culture, and helper modifiers.
glossary.researchCost.name: Research Cost
glossary.researchCost.description: The amount of research points required to finish a technology node. Later technologies become dramatically more expensive.
glossary.researchPower.name: Research Power
glossary.researchPower.description: The raw research point output created by your assigned team. It is important for both funding requirements and technology unlock speed.
glossary.trainingQuality.name: Training Quality
glossary.trainingQuality.description: The resulting model quality contributed by data fit, compute overprovisioning, and talent during training.
glossary.serviceUsers.name: Service Users
glossary.serviceUsers.description: The active user base across all live service channels. It is a core input to both market share and monthly revenue.
glossary.salary.name: Salary
glossary.salary.description: The monthly compensation paid to retain one talent member. Higher-level talent becomes much more expensive.
glossary.colocation.name: Colocation
glossary.colocation.description: A model where you rent rack space in an external facility to operate owned GPUs. It is faster than building a datacenter but less scalable long term.
glossary.datacenter.name: Datacenter
glossary.datacenter.description: A facility used to run large-scale compute infrastructure directly. It offers long-term compute leverage but is highly capital intensive.
glossary.gpuAccess.name: GPU Access
glossary.gpuAccess.description: How easy it is to secure modern accelerators in a country or region. It is strongly shaped by geopolitics and export controls.
glossary.aiTalentPool.name: AI Talent Pool
glossary.aiTalentPool.description: The density of hireable researchers and engineers in a region. Higher values mean a richer recruiting market.
glossary.regulation.name: Regulation
glossary.regulation.description: The rules and constraints governments place on AI firms. Heavier regulation raises costs but can also improve stability and trust.
glossary.exportControl.name: Export Control
glossary.exportControl.description: The degree to which a state restricts transfers of advanced chips, models, and equipment. Higher levels make supply chains and global expansion harder.
glossary.relation.name: Relation
glossary.relation.description: The diplomatic relationship level with a rival or state actor. Higher values make partnerships and licensing easier, while lower values increase conflict.
glossary.passiveCollection.name: Passive Collection
glossary.passiveCollection.description: A way of continuously accumulating user logs and interaction data while services run. It is cheap, but comes with privacy sensitivity.
glossary.computeAllocation.name: Compute Allocation
glossary.computeAllocation.description: The decision of how to split finite TFLOPS between training, serving, internal AI, and chip development.
glossary.modelPerformance.name: Model Performance
glossary.modelPerformance.description: The overall result showing how a model performs against benchmarks and market expectations.
glossary.benchmarkScore.name: Benchmark Score
glossary.benchmarkScore.description: The score a model records on a given evaluation set. It is the most direct way to compare strengths and weaknesses.
glossary.campaignAct.name: Campaign Act
glossary.campaignAct.description: A historical phase of the campaign. Later acts unlock higher-order politics, supply-chain, safety, and world-order issues.
glossary.speedCulture.name: Speed Culture
glossary.speedCulture.description: Measures how strongly the organization prioritizes rapid experimentation and launch speed. It improves pace, but also raises mistake risk.
glossary.academicCulture.name: Academic Culture
glossary.academicCulture.description: Represents how much the organization values rigorous research, reproducibility, and paper-driven work.
glossary.missionCulture.name: Mission Culture
glossary.missionCulture.description: Represents how strongly the team is bound together by long-term vision and social purpose.
glossary.securityCulture.name: Security Culture
glossary.securityCulture.description: Measures how systematically the company protects models, chips, data, and personnel.
glossary.transparencyCulture.name: Transparency Culture
glossary.transparencyCulture.description: Measures how openly the company records and shares failures and decisions. It raises trust but can create short-term friction.
glossary.ideology_profit_driven.name: Profit-Driven
glossary.ideology_profit_driven.descript: Prioritizes profitability and market control. Strongly aligned with commercialization and revenue optimization.
glossary.trait_perfectionist.name: Perfectionist
glossary.trait_perfectionist.description: Perfectionist trait. 연구 품질↑ 속도↓. It contributes quality multiplier 1.2 and speed multiplier 0.8.
glossary.trait_speedrunner.name: Speedrunner
glossary.trait_speedrunner.description: Speedrunner trait. 속도↑ 품질↓. It contributes quality multiplier 0.85 and speed multiplier 1.3.
glossary.trait_team_player.name: Team Player
glossary.trait_team_player.description: Team Player trait. 협업 시너지↑. It contributes quality multiplier 1 and speed multiplier 1.
glossary.trait_lone_wolf.name: Lone Wolf
glossary.trait_lone_wolf.description: Lone Wolf trait. 단독 연구↑ 협업↓. It contributes quality multiplier 1.15 and speed multiplier 1.1.
glossary.trait_innovator.name: Innovator
glossary.trait_innovator.description: Innovator trait. 돌파구 확률↑. It contributes quality multiplier 1 and speed multiplier 1.
glossary.trait_mentor.name: Mentor
glossary.trait_mentor.description: Mentor trait. 주변 인재 성장↑. It contributes quality multiplier 1 and speed multiplier 0.95.
glossary.trait_workaholic.name: Workaholic
glossary.trait_workaholic.description: Workaholic trait. 생산성↑ 번아웃 위험↑. It contributes quality multiplier 1 and speed multiplier 1.4.
glossary.trait_balanced.name: Balanced
glossary.trait_balanced.description: Balanced trait. 안정적 성과. It contributes quality multiplier 1.05 and speed multiplier 1.05.
glossary.researchCategory_foundation.des: This branch covers the core principles and learning mechanics that underpin AI research.
glossary.researchCategory_model_arch.des: This branch focuses on architectures that change model structure and representation.
glossary.researchCategory_advanced_ai.de: This branch improves advanced capabilities such as reasoning, planning, and tool use.
glossary.researchCategory_frontier_ai.de: This branch is tied directly to frontier performance and the race toward AGI.
glossary.researchCategory_generative.des: This branch strengthens generative models and multimodal creative capabilities.
glossary.researchCategory_data.name: Data
glossary.researchCategory_data.descripti: This branch covers data acquisition, refinement, and governance.
glossary.researchCategory_chip.name: Chips / Processors
glossary.researchCategory_chip.descripti: This branch covers accelerator, semiconductor, and compute-efficiency technology.
glossary.researchCategory_infra.name: Infrastructure
glossary.researchCategory_infra.descript: This branch covers serving, orchestration, and platform operations.
glossary.researchCategory_energy.name: Power / Energy
glossary.researchCategory_energy.descrip: This branch focuses on power, cooling, and efficiency optimization.
glossary.researchCategory_product.name: AI Products
glossary.researchCategory_product.descri: This branch unlocks user-facing AI products and commercial capabilities.
glossary.researchCategory_safety.name: Safety / Alignment
glossary.researchCategory_safety.descrip: This branch is focused on alignment, evaluation, control, and accident prevention.
glossary.researchCategory_quantum.name: Quantum Computing
glossary.researchCategory_quantum.descri: This branch explores quantum computing and next-generation compute paradigms.
glossary.researchCategory_integration.de: This branch integrates multiple capabilities into AGI-scale systems.
glossary.researchGroup_research.name: Research
glossary.researchGroup_research.descript: This group drives core capability growth from fundamentals to frontier models.
glossary.researchGroup_service.name: Services
glossary.researchGroup_service.descripti: This group expands user-facing products and generative features.
glossary.researchGroup_infra.name: Infrastructure
glossary.researchGroup_infra.description: This group strengthens chips, datacenters, and compute operations.
glossary.researchGroup_governance.name: Governance
glossary.researchGroup_governance.descri: This group handles data governance, safety, and policy response.
glossary.architecture_cnn.name: CNN
glossary.architecture_cnn.description: 이미지 인식 및 분류에 특화된 아키텍처. Best fit data: Images.
glossary.architecture_rnn_lstm.name: RNN/LSTM
glossary.architecture_rnn_lstm.descripti: 순차 데이터 처리에 적합한 순환 신경망. Best fit data: Web Text.
glossary.architecture_transformer.name: Transformer
glossary.architecture_transformer.descri: Attention 메커니즘 기반의 범용 아키텍처. 2017년 "Attention Is All You Need". Best fit data: Web Text, Books.
glossary.architecture_gpt.name: GPT
glossary.architecture_gpt.description: 자기회귀 언어 모델. 텍스트 생성의 혁명. Best fit data: Web Text, Books, Code.
glossary.architecture_diffusion.name: Diffusion
glossary.architecture_diffusion.descript: 노이즈 제거 기반 생성 모델. 이미지/영상 생성의 혁명. Best fit data: Images, Web Text.
glossary.architecture_moe.name: Mixture of Experts
glossary.architecture_moe.description: 조건부 연산으로 효율적 스케일링. 추론 비용 대비 높은 성능. Best fit data: Web Text, Books, Code, Scientific.
glossary.architecture_multimodal_arch.de: 텍스트, 이미지, 오디오, 비디오를 모두 처리하는 통합 아키텍처. Best fit data: Web Text, Books, Code, Images, Audio, Video.
glossary.architecture_agent_arch.name: Agent Architecture
glossary.architecture_agent_arch.descrip: 도구 사용, 계획, 자율 실행이 가능한 에이전트 아키텍처. Best fit data: Web Text, Code, Scientific.
glossary.parameterScale_tiny.name: Tiny
glossary.parameterScale_tiny.description: <100M scale. It recommends at least 10 TFLOPS, 8GB VRAM, and 0.5TB of data.
glossary.parameterScale_small.name: Small
glossary.parameterScale_small.descriptio: 100M-1B scale. It recommends at least 50 TFLOPS, 16GB VRAM, and 2TB of data.
glossary.parameterScale_medium.name: Medium
glossary.parameterScale_medium.descripti: 1B-10B scale. It recommends at least 200 TFLOPS, 32GB VRAM, and 10TB of data.
glossary.parameterScale_large.name: Large
glossary.parameterScale_large.descriptio: 10B-100B scale. It recommends at least 1000 TFLOPS, 80GB VRAM, and 50TB of data.
glossary.parameterScale_xlarge.name: Xlarge
glossary.parameterScale_xlarge.descripti: 100B-500B scale. It recommends at least 5000 TFLOPS, 128GB VRAM, and 200TB of data.
glossary.parameterScale_frontier.name: Frontier
glossary.parameterScale_frontier.descrip: 500B-2T scale. It recommends at least 10000 TFLOPS, 192GB VRAM, and 500TB of data.
glossary.parameterScale_massive.name: Massive
glossary.parameterScale_massive.descript: 2T+ scale. It recommends at least 50000 TFLOPS, 192GB VRAM, and 1000TB of data.
glossary.deployment_api.name: Api
glossary.deployment_api.description: 개발자를 위한 API. B2B 중심의 안정적 수익.
glossary.deployment_consumer_chat.name: Consumer Chat
glossary.deployment_consumer_chat.descri: 소비자용 대화형 AI. 대규모 사용자 기반.
glossary.deployment_enterprise.name: Enterprise
glossary.deployment_enterprise.descripti: 기업 맞춤형 솔루션. 고객당 높은 수익.
glossary.deployment_open_source.name: Open Source
glossary.deployment_open_source.descript: 무료 공개. 직접 수익 적지만 평판 대폭 상승.
glossary.deployment_government.name: Government
glossary.deployment_government.descripti: 정부/군 계약. 매우 높은 수익, 논란 가능성.
glossary.service_b2b_license.name: B2B Licensing
glossary.service_b2b_license.description: A channel that licenses technology to outside firms or supplies it in a white-label form.
glossary.dataMethod_purchase.name: Purchase
glossary.dataMethod_purchase.description: Buy directly from a data marketplace. Expensive, but reliable and immediate.. Base quality 80%, freshness 90%, and legal sensitivity 5%.
glossary.dataMethod_partnership.name: Partnership
glossary.dataMethod_partnership.descript: Sign data-sharing agreements with institutions. Slower, but cheaper.. Base quality 75%, freshness 70%, and legal sensitivity 10%.
glossary.dataMethod_scraping.name: Web Scraping
glossary.dataMethod_scraping.description: Collect public web data and forums. Cheap, but legally risky.. Base quality 50%, freshness 85%, and legal sensitivity 40%.
glossary.dataMethod_synthetic.name: Synthetic Generation
glossary.dataMethod_synthetic.descriptio: Generate synthetic training data from existing models and pipelines. Compute-intensive.. Base quality 60%, freshness 95%, and legal sensitivity 5%.
glossary.dataMethod_userLogs.name: User Log Collection
glossary.dataMethod_userLogs.description: Accumulate interaction logs from deployed services. Free, but privacy-sensitive.. Base quality 70%, freshness 100%, and legal sensitivity 30%.
glossary.doctrine_state_backed.name: State-Backed
glossary.doctrine_state_backed.descripti: Leverages state support and data access.
glossary.act_political.name: Act 3: Political Economy
glossary.act_political.description: Regulation, export controls, lobbying, supply chain wars.
glossary.ending_singularity.name: Singularity
glossary.ending_singularity.description: An ending where you build an AI beyond human level and open a new civilization.
glossary.ending_bankrupt.name: Bankruptcy
glossary.ending_bankrupt.description: An ending where the company collapses after running out of cash and trust.
glossary.ending_competitor_agi.name: Rival Reaches AGI
